pages.text: There’s an alien in my house... We are under attack!

blocks.text: There’s an alien in my house... We are under attack!

pages.text: The walls are changing colour. It must be the alien. The air is getting warmer. It must be the alien.

blocks.text: The walls are changing colour. It must be the alien. The air is getting warmer. It must be the alien.

pages.text: Strangers keep coming. It must be the alien.

blocks.text: Strangers keep coming. It must be the alien.

pages.text: We need protection. I build a fort. Mom and Dad normally build with me, but these days I feel invisible. It must be the alien.

blocks.text: We need protection. I build a fort.
Mom and Dad normally build with me, but these days I feel invisible. It must be the alien.

pages.text: We are under attack! I am an army of one.

blocks.text: We are under attack! I am an army of one.

pages.text: 1 step, 2 step... I am the army. 3 step, 4 step... Ready for battle.

blocks.text: 1 step, 2 step... I am the army.

pages.text: 5 step, 6 step... Away with you, alien!

blocks.text: 5 step, 6 step... Away with you, alien!

pages.text: 9 step, 10 step... I am by its head. Woah! I get a fright. It is tiny and it... ...looks like me?! How can that be? Is it really an alien?

Woah! I get a fright. It is tiny and it...
...looks like me?! How can that be? Is it really an alien?

pages.text: Maybe it’s a friend. Maybe it’s my friend?

blocks.text: Maybe it’s a friend. Maybe it’s my friend?

pages.text: 1 step, 2 step... We are now an army of two.

blocks.text: 1 step, 2 step... We are now an army of two.
